$schema: Manual URL redirects — merged into the redirect table alongside the Shopify Admin export (redirects.json). Use this file for redirects that must SURVIVE the daily `pull-inventory.mjs` sync, which overwrites redirects.json wholesale. Same shape as redirects.json: { source, destination }. Sources are path-only (no query/hash/regexp meta — see build-redirects-table.mjs#isValidSource). Listed first at build time so a manual entry overrides a stale Shopify one for the same source.

redirects.note: SEMrush 20260611 audit: this collections URL 404s (no such collection). /pages/mattress-accessories looked like the natural target but that page is UNPUBLISHED in Shopify (it 404s too — verified 20260611) and its body is one thin sentence, not worth publishing. /collections/bedding is the live accessories umbrella (40 products: protectors, toppers, pillows, sheets). Fixes the single site-wide 4xx.

SEMrush 20260612 audit: 4xx. Shopify-convention catch-all collection that was never created in this store (collectionByHandle('all') is null - verified via Admin API 20260612); route to the main catalog PLP.
SEMrush 20260612 audit: 4xx. No CMS page with this handle exists (pages query empty - verified via Admin API 20260612); the content lives at the identically-named blog index.

SEMrush 20260612 audit: duplicate title tag + 2 broken internal links. The -1 article is an accidental duplicate (created 2026-06-11, one day after the identically-titled original). Redirect-shadowing removes it from related-articles rotation, the HTML sitemap, and the XML sitemap via the shared redirect table. The Shopify article itself is left published for the merchant to delete.
